    <script>
    // BEAT MESSAGE
    try {
        window.wixBiSession = {
            initialTimestamp : Date.now(),
            viewerSessionId: 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function(c)
                    { var r = Math.random()*16|0, v = c == 'x' ? r : (r&0x3|0x8); return v.toString(16); }
            )
        };
        (new Image()).src = 'http://frog.wix.com/bt?src=29&evid=3&pn=1&et=1&v=1.1626.27&msid=eea129c5-8582-4559-8d2f-f3f15881628b&vsi=' + wixBiSession.viewerSessionId +
                '&url=' + encodeURIComponent(location.href.replace(/^http(s)?:\/\/(www\.)?/, '')) +
                '&isp=1&st=2&ts=0&c=' + wixBiSession.initialTimestamp;
    } catch (e){}
    // BEAT MESSAGE END
</script>
